title: YP Action-Spotting Label Contract
description: Source of truth for the *_actions.jsonl label records and frame cache layout exchanged between yp-video (producer) and yp-spot (consumer). Generated from yp_video/contracts/action.py via make_schema.py — do not edit by hand. yp-spot mirrors these constants in yp_spot/contract.py under the same version.

ActionEvent.description: A single spotted action at one frame, with a normalized court location.

frame.description: 0-based frame index into the frame cache
frame.title: Frame

xy.description: Normalized [x, y] court location, each in [0, 1]
xy.title: Xy

visible.description: Whether the action is visible on screen
visible.title: Visible

ActionEvent.title: ActionEvent

ActionLabelRecord.description: One video's worth of action labels — the unit of a ``*_actions.jsonl`` row.

video.description: Video stem; matches the frame-cache directory name
video.title: Video

num_frames.description: Total frames in the cache for this video
num_frames.title: Num Frames

ActionLabelRecord.title: ActionLabelRecord

SegmentLabelEvent.description:
A label covering a contiguous frame span (e.g. one rally), inclusive.

Segment label files (rally training) reuse the ``ActionLabelRecord`` layout
with these events instead of point actions; yp-spot fills every frame of the
span with the class during training and evaluates with segment mAP.

end_frame.description: 0-based last frame of the span, inclusive
end_frame.title: End Frame

SegmentLabelEvent.title: SegmentLabelEvent
